title: RelianceSummary
description: Summary of agent reliance on a source during the review period.

source_name.description: The name of the source the agent relied on.

source_type.description: The type of source (e.g., document, database, API, file).

count.description: The number of times this source was relied on.

scope_summary.description: A summary of the scope of reliance on this source.

evidence_reference.description: A reference to the reliance records for this source.
